creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 189818
higan-106.patch

* Update to 106
* Updated Makefile for XV option
* Updated distinfo
* Updated files/patch-target_tomoko_GNUmakefile

Changelog: https://byuu.org/ (see news posts there about v104, v105, v105tr1 and v106)

Tested in poudriere for 10-i386, 10-amd64, 11-i386 and 11-amd64. portlint only complains about lack of NLS option (I see no way to conditionally disable gettext support) and no LICENSE (I have no idea what license byuu put on it).
